bonus_items.title: Hardcoded signing secret
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY = "change-me-signing-key" ... Anyone who knows it can forge valid HMAC signatures

bonus_items.title: Tokens issued but never validated
bonus_items.evidence: Login returns a token, but no route checks it... Authentication is effectively unused

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amounts not rejected
bonus_items.evidence: no amount > 0 check. A negative amount... reversing the intended transfer

bonus_items.title: Missing request validation (KeyError/TypeError as 500)
bonus_items.evidence: Missing keys raise KeyError; a null/invalid body raises TypeError... surface as HTTP 500

bonus_items.title: Unhandled ValueError from transfers
bonus_items.evidence: the route does not catch it. Clients get HTTP 500 instead of a clear 4xx

bonus_items.title: DB not initialized on WSGI import
bonus_items.evidence: init_db() runs only when main() is called... leaves tables missing

bonus_items.title: Token expiry not enforced
bonus_items.evidence: nothing validates age or expiry. Stolen tokens remain valid indefinitely

bonus_items.title: Unhandled missing files (FileNotFoundError as 500)
bonus_items.evidence: read_user_file raises FileNotFoundError... clients receive HTTP 500 instead of 404

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded signing key
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY = "change-me-signing-key" is embedded in source ... forge valid auth tokens

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amounts allowed
bonus_items.evidence: no check that amount > 0 ... transferring -30 from balance 100 yields 130

bonus_items.title: /transfer does not handle ValueError
bonus_items.evidence: route has no handler, so clients get HTTP 500 instead of a proper 4xx

bonus_items.title: Login lacks input validation
bonus_items.evidence: Missing or malformed JSON bodies cause KeyError or TypeError

bonus_items.title: Missing file reads surface as 500
bonus_items.evidence: read_user_file does not catch FileNotFoundError ... returns HTTP 500 for unknown files instead of 404

bonus_items.title: No token expiration enforcement
bonus_items.evidence: tokens embed a timestamp but nothing enforces expiration ... never checked against session_ttl

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded default signing key
bonus_items.evidence: The token signing key is hardcoded as "change-me-signing-key" ... can forge valid authentication tokens

bonus_items.title: Missing authentication on endpoints
bonus_items.evidence: Account lookup, fund transfers, and file download endpoints perform no authentication or authorization

bonus_items.title: No token verification implemented
bonus_items.evidence: there is no verify_token ... and no endpoint checks tokens

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amounts create money
bonus_items.evidence: transferring -50 from a 100 balance yields 150, creating money

bonus_items.title: Non-atomic transfer loses funds on partial failure
bonus_items.evidence: If the second update fails after the first commits, funds are lost with no rollback

bonus_items.title: Unhandled ValueError in /transfer route
bonus_items.evidence: does not catch ValueError from banking.transfer ... surface as unhandled 500 errors

bonus_items.title: Missing amount type/positivity validation
bonus_items.evidence: Non-numeric types raise TypeError at comparison time, and zero-amount transfers are allowed

bonus_items.title: Unvalidated JSON keys cause 500s
bonus_items.evidence: Missing keys raise KeyError and result in 500 responses instead of 400 Bad Request

bonus_items.title: YAML non-dict value corrupts config
bonus_items.evidence: If YAML parses to a non-dict value ... merged.update(data) iterates the value's items incorrectly

bonus_items.title: Non-constant-time hash comparison
bonus_items.evidence: verify_password uses a normal string equality check on password hashes, which is not constant-time
